stemHtml: The function of the generator breaker is to close when the voltage of the…

options.a: generator is greater than battery voltage and to open when the opposite is true
options.b: battery is greater than the generator voltage and to open when the opposite is true
options.c: alternator is greater than the battery voltage and to open when the opposite is true
options.d: battery is greater than the alternator voltage and to open when the opposite is true
